revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2023 March 2#Template:Empty section]] closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: fixing issue
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Fixing the bad interwiki on a template
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Removing from [[Category:Ambox transclusions]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2023 March 2#Template:Empty section]] closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Empty section}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Empty section | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = content | small = {{{small|left}}} | image = [[File:Wiki letter w cropped.svg|20px|alt=[icon]]] | text = '''This section is empty.''' {{#if:{{{comment|}}}|{{Terminate sentence|{{{comment}}}}}}} You can help by [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit&section={{{section|}}}}} adding to it].{{#if: {{{find|}}} | {{br}}{{find sources mainspace|{{{find|{{ARTICLENAME}} }}} | {{{find2|}}} }} |}} | cat = Articles to be expanded | all = All articles to be expanded | date = {{{date|}}} | cat2 = Articles with empty sections | all2 = All articles with empty sections | date2 = {{{date|}}} }}<!--{{Empty section}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Empty_section here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Empty_section for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Empty section}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Empty section | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = content | small = {{{small|left}}} | image = [[File:Wiki letter w cropped.svg|20px|alt=[icon]]] | text = '''This section is empty.''' {{#if:{{{comment|}}}|{{Terminate sentence|{{{comment}}}}}}} You can help by [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit&section={{{section|}}}}} adding to it].{{#if: {{{find|}}} | {{br}}{{find sources mainspace|{{{find|{{ARTICLENAME}} }}} | {{{find2|}}} }} |}} | cat = Articles to be expanded | all = All articles to be expanded | date = {{{date|}}} | cat2 = Articles with empty sections | all2 = All articles with empty sections | date2 = {{{date|}}} }}<!--{{Empty section}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Empty_section for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Ambox
| name  = Empty section
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly>
| type  = content
| small = {{{small|left}}}
| image = [[File:Wiki letter w cropped.svg|20px|alt=[icon]]]
| text  = '''This section is empty.''' {{#if:{{{comment|}}}|{{Terminate sentence|{{{comment}}}}}}} You can help by [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit&section={{{section|}}}}} adding to it].{{#if: {{{find|}}} | {{br}}{{find sources mainspace|{{{find|{{ARTICLENAME}} }}} | {{{find2|}}} }} |}}
| cat   = Articles to be expanded
| all   = All articles to be expanded
| date  = {{{date|}}}
| cat2  = Articles with empty sections
| all2  =  All articles with empty sections
| date2 = {{{date|}}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
